name: blendex
description: Connect CodeX to Blender Geometry Nodes through safe structured operations.

interface.shortDescription: Drive Blender Geometry Nodes from CodeX
interface.longDescription: BlendeX lets CodeX connect to a local Blender add-on and create Geometry Nodes networks through structured, allowlisted operations.
defaultPrompt: Connect to Blender and inspect the current scene
Create a simple procedural Geometry Nodes setup on the selected object
